de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.macros

Class AbstractFinishAuxiliaryComputationMacro

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.AbstractProofMacro
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.macros.AbstractFinishAuxiliaryComputationMacro
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ProofMacro
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    FinishAuxiliaryBlockComputationMacro, FinishAuxiliaryLoopComputationMacro, FinishAuxiliaryMethodComputationMacro

    public abstract class AbstractFinishAuxiliaryComputationMacro
extends AbstractProofMacro
    Author:
    christoph

    • Method Detail

      • getName

        public String getName()
        Description copied from interface: ProofMacro
        Gets the name of this macro. Used as menu entry
        Returns:
        a non-null constant string

      • getCategory

        public String getCategory()
        Description copied from interface: ProofMacro
        Gets the category of this macro. Used as name of the menu under which the macro is sorted. Return null if no submenu is to be created.
        Returns:
        a constant string, or null

      • getDescription

        public String getDescription()
        Description copied from interface: ProofMacro
        Gets the description of this macro. Used as tooltip.
        Returns:
        a non-null constant string
